ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tree_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tree species */,
  "name" TEXT /* Common name of the tree species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the tree species */,
  "abundance" INTEGER /* Abundance of the tree species */,
  "profits" INTEGER /* Potential profits from the tree species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the tree species */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate of the tree species */,
  "lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the tree species in years */,
  "flowering_period" TEXT /* Flowering period of the tree species */,
  "fruit_bearing" TEXT /* Details about fruit bearing capabilities */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to an image or detailed information about the tree species */,
  "max_height" INTEGER /* Maximum height of the tree species in meters */,
  "moisture_preference" TEXT /* Moisture preference of the tree species */,
  "shade_tolerance" TEXT /* Shade tolerance of the tree species */,
  "soil_preference" TEXT /* Soil preference of the tree species */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the species record */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the species record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tree_species_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., ranger, scientist, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental condition */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the environmental condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_environment" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree species */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental condition */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the environmental condition for the tree species */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_environment_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES tree_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_environment_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES environmental_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree species the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption describing the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_images_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES tree_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree species the link belongs to */,
  "link_url" TEXT /* URL of the link */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of the link (e.g., research article, Wikipedia) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_links_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES tree_species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree species */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_history_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES tree_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree species */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., observation, suggestion) */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_comments_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES tree_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree species being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the species record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the species record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES tree_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
